title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1870 - Costs of filing to be paid by petitioners
text:
67.1870.  Costs of filing to be paid by petitioners. — The costs of filing and defending the petition and all publication and incidental costs incurred in obtaining circuit court certification of the petition for voter approval shall be paid by the petitioners.  If a district is organized pursuant to sections 67.1860 to 67.1898, the petitioners may be reimbursed for such costs out of the revenues received by the district.
(L. 2001 H.B. 80 merged with S.B. 224) 
Effective 5-16-01 (S.B. 224); 7-02-01 (H.B. 80)
